rulings.Case Title: ALEKSANDR RABINOVICH VS. FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY DBA FIRST
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 14, 2010, line 3. DEFENDANTS DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE'S DEMURRER TO 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled as to 1st and 5th causes of action. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action (set aside notice of sale) due to the inconsistent allegations and uncertainty. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend but without prejudice as to 3rd cause of action (quiet title). Plaintiffs are still owners of the property and the recorded foreclosure notices do not effect plaintiff's title, ownership, or possession in the property. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to the 4th cause of action (fraud) for failure to plead justifiable reliance relative to the alleged misrepresentations. No reasonable probability that defects can be cured by amendment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MINOTT WESSINGER AS TRUSTEE OF THE MINOTT VS. EDWARD KAVOUNAS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 14, 2010, line 6. PLAINTIFF MINOTT WESSINGER AS TRUSTEE'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER OF STEVE WERNEY TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend as to affirative defenses 1 (failure to state a cause of action), 9 (no proximate cause) and 19 (reservation of rights) as they are not affirmative defenses. Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to remaining contested affirmative defenses to plead facts in support. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MINOTT WESSINGER AS TRUSTEE OF THE MINOTT VS. EDWARD KAVOUNAS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
